name: Pork and Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 16 oz can pork and beans, undrained
16 oz can pork and beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a Crock-Pot lightly.
2. Combine beans, onion, cheese, chili powder, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, white vinegar, and mustard in the Crock-Pot.
3. Top with crumbled bacon.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
5. Serve.
